entity.name: cxuan
entity.description: I am the maintainer of bestJavaer, a long-running open-source Chinese developer education repository. The project originally focused on Java, operating systems, computer networks, concurrency, JVM, MySQL, Spring and developer learning materials. It is now being evolved into cxuan-ai-labs, an open AI lab for Chinese-speaking developers focused on practical AI experiments, curated resources, reproducible workflows, and documented failure cases.

projects.name: bestJavaer / cxuan-ai-labs
projects.description: bestJavaer started as a Chinese open-source learning repository for Java developers, covering Java, operating systems, computer networks, concurrency, JVM, MySQL, Spring and developer career materials. It is now being evolved into cxuan-ai-labs: an open AI lab for Chinese-speaking developers, collecting AI articles, reproducible experiments, curated resources, AI-assisted development workflows and documented failure cases.

channels.description: Please contact the maintainer by email for grant paperwork, payment details and tax documentation.

plans.name: Sustainability support for bestJavaer / cxuan-ai-labs
plans.description: One-time support to sustain the transition of bestJavaer into cxuan-ai-labs, including repository restructuring, open documentation, AI resource curation, reproducible AI experiments, evaluation notes and community maintenance.
